inputs.incident: Error rate on the API jumped to 30% at 02:10 UTC after a config push.
inputs.severity_policy: SEV1 if user-facing errors above 10%; declare within 5 minutes.

expected_outputs.postmortem_seed: Config push at 02:10 caused a 30% error spike; rolled back by 02:21. Follow-up: canary config changes.

notes: Triages and mitigates an incident with a declared severity and recorded timeline.
